name: testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalysisData
title: testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalysisData
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalysisData (ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, dword msgField, dword bitNo, ScopeDutyCycleDefinition dutyCycle, ScopeBitDataDutyCycle data);
description: Returns the serial bit analysis data and duty cycle data for the defined bit.

parameters.name: msgField
parameters.description: The field within the message. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin.

parameters.name: bitNo
parameters.description: The bit number within the msg field.

parameters.name: dutyCycle
parameters.description: The duty cycle measurement parameters. See ScopeDutyCycleDefintion.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The duty cycle data for the defined bit. See ScopeBitDataDutyCycle.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
